speed_with_safety.name: Speed with Safety
speed_with_safety.description: Ship small, reversible changes behind flags; practice promote/rollback. Fast flow (trunk-based development, small PRs), automated quality/security gates, and frequent integration deliver quick results without sacrificing reliability.

simplicity_over_complexity.name: Simplicity over Complexity
simplicity_over_complexity.description: Prefer a modular monolith with vertical slices and hexagonal boundaries. Monolith-first and 12-Factor patterns keep architecture lean. Kanban and Shape Up focus work and limit scope.

quality_through_determinism.name: Quality through Determinism
quality_through_determinism.description: Contract-first, typed boundaries, measurable gates, reproducible outcomes. Rigorous, measurable gates (OWASP ASVS, NIST SSDF, STRIDE threat modeling, SLOs/DORA metrics) plus contract and property-based tests ensure every change is observable, testable, and reversible.

guided_agentic_autonomy.name: Guided Agentic Autonomy
guided_agentic_autonomy.description: Agents operate within deterministic, observable, reversible bounds with HITL. AI systems autonomously self-build, self-heal, and self-tune while humans retain ultimate authority, oversight, and accountability.

evolvable_modularity.name: Evolvable Modularity
evolvable_modularity.description: Contract-driven Hexagonal boundaries and a modular monolith keep capabilities loosely coupled and tech choices reversible. Edges (databases, models, providers, surfaces) can be swapped, scaled, or retired as plug-and-play adapters.

spec.name: Spec
spec.description: Specification and requirements definition. Every material change starts with a one-pager + ADR and micro-STRIDE.

plan.name: Plan
plan.description: Implementation planning and task breakdown. Convert spec to BMAD story with context packets + agent plan + acceptance criteria.

implement.name: Implement
implement.description: Code implementation with agent assistance. Plan → Diff → Explain → Test loop with human checkpoints.

verify.name: Verify
verify.description: Verification through testing and quality gates. Unit, contract, and integration tests plus security scans.

ship.name: Ship
ship.description: Deployment and release. PR preview, feature flag, promotion workflow.

operate.name: Operate
operate.description: Production operation and monitoring. SLO tracking, alerting, incident response.

learn.name: Learn
learn.description: Learning and improvement. Postmortems, retros, kaizen improvements.

low.name: Low
low.description: Minor feature changes, bug fixes, non-critical paths

medium.name: Medium
medium.description: Significant features, API changes, dependency updates

high.name: High
high.description: Security, auth, payments, core infrastructure, data migrations

T3.name: Tier 3
T3.description: High-risk changes requiring navigator + security review

hitlCheckpoints.name: Pre-Implementation
hitlCheckpoints.description: SpecKit one-pager + micro-STRIDE + acceptance criteria approved by Navigator

hitlCheckpoints.name: Pre-Merge
hitlCheckpoints.description: PR review using risk rubric with license/provenance note and OpenAPI diff

hitlCheckpoints.name: Pre-Promote
hitlCheckpoints.description: Feature behind flag, Preview e2e smoke green, rollback noted, owner on-call

hitlCheckpoints.name: Post-Promote
hitlCheckpoints.description: 30-minute watch window; check SLO burn-rate and key SLIs; document in PR thread
